title: Option prices from operational-time reaction-boundary lattices
abstract: arXiv:2606.09564v2 Announce Type: replace  Abstract: We consider the role of a continuum operational time u and its mapping to calendar time t and how these relate to event time for option pricing problems. We derive option-pricing equations from an operational-time Markov lattice rather than from a calendar-time diffusion. The primitive model is a nearest-neighbour log-price lattice with state- and time-dependent transition probabilities. Its Chapman-Kolmogorov decomposition yields discrete forward and backward equations, which converge under local finite-variance scaling to the usual continuum adjoint pair. In price variables, the backward equation gives a generalized European pricing PDE and reduces to Black-Scholes-Merton under the risk-neutral drift restriction and constant volatility. Interpreted as a reaction-boundary model for limit-order-book mid-prices, the construction identifies local volatility with an activity-rescaled risk-neutral bid-ask reaction-boundary variance. The

Title: Option prices from operational-time reaction-boundary lattices
Abstract: arXiv:2606.09564v2 Announce Type: replace  Abstract: We consider the role of a continuum operational time u and its mapping to calendar time t and how these relate to event time for option pricing problems. We derive option-pricing equations from an operational-time Markov lattice rather than from a calendar-time diffusion. Its Chapman-Kolmogorov decomposition yields discrete forward and backward equations, which converge under local finite-variance scaling to the usual continuum adjoint pair. In price variables, the backward equation gives a generalized European pricing PDE and reduces to Black-Scholes-Merton under the risk-neutral drift restriction and constant volatility. translated_title: 基于操作时间反应边界格子的期权定价
translated_abstract: 我们考虑连续操作时间u及其与日历时间t的映射，以及它们如何与期权定价问题中的事件时间相关联。我们从操作时间马尔可夫格子而非日历时间扩散推导出期权定价方程。原始模型是一个最近邻对数价格格子，具有状态和时间依赖的转移概率。其查普曼-科尔莫戈罗夫分解产生离散的正向和反向方程，在局部有限方差标度下收敛到通常的连续伴随对。在价格变量中，反向方程给出广义欧式定价偏微分方程，并在风险中性漂移限制和恒定波动率下简化为布莱克-舒尔斯-默顿模型。解释为限价订单簿中间价的反应边界模型，该构造将局部波动率识别为活动率调整后的风险中性买卖价差反应边界方差。
tldr: 本文提出一种基于操作时间马尔可夫格子的期权定价方法，通过反应边界模型将局部波动率与限价订单簿的买卖价差方差联系起来，推广了布莱克-舒尔斯-默顿模型。
en_tdlr: This paper proposes an option pricing method based on an operational-time Markov lattice, linking local volatility to bid-ask reaction-boundary variance in limit-order-book models, generalizing the Black-Scholes-Merton framework.
